nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 大鵟
nodes.summary: 大鵟（Upland buzzard，学名 Buteo hemilasius），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: While recorded at over in elevation, the species normally nests at elevations between and may at times be recorded down to sea-level during the winter. In the montane areas it nests in habitats such as alpine meadow, upland steppe and plateaus, often foraging in these assorted grasslands and rocky areas
